name: pi-agent
tagline: Router/index skill for installing, configuring, and building on the Pi terminal coding agent (CLI, SDK, RPC, extensions, packages).
verdict: Clean, low-risk reference index: no shell-piped code execution, no secret handling beyond advising env vars/OAuth, install command uses --ignore-scripts, no hidden or manipulative instructions. Weak spots are quality-only: no negative triggers, no explicit output contract or failure-path guidance, and it points to a dozen references/*.md files that were not

highlights.summary: No explicit 'do not use for X' guidance anywhere in frontmatter or body; a user could misapply it to unrelated coding-agent tools.
No guidance for what to do if a referenced file is missing, a provider auth fails, or `pi` isn't installed — failure paths aren't addressed in the SKILL.md body.
